data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for emergency override functionality.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the emergency override feature, which allows a manager to force assignment. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for an emergency override, but there is no direct evidence supporting its implementation or availability, indicating a gap in the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the emergency override functionality allowing a manager to force assignment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the emergency override functionality.
